currentTask.name: Phase-gate.sh --check-quality now auto-runs constitution + decision pipeline
currentTask.goal: Make --check-quality the single comprehensive flag: runs constitution gates, gate plugins, and decision pipeline automatically at every phase-gate invocation.

whatChanged: phase-gate.sh --check-quality now auto-runs constitution gates for the phase transition
phase-gate.sh --check-quality now auto-runs the decision pipeline (research->plan, plan->implement, implement->verify)
Constitution gate failure now sets OVERALL_RESULT so exit code matches combined result
STATE_FILE defined early in phase-gate.sh for decision pipeline task extraction
filesTouched: scripts/phase-gate.sh (--check-quality now comprehensive: constitution + gates + pipeline)
verification: phase-gate.sh plan --check-quality runs constitution + catfish + scope-check + research->plan pipeline
phase-gate.sh implement --check-quality runs constitution + 5 gate plugins + plan->implement pipeline
Constitution BLOCK correctly propagates to OVERALL_RESULT (exit 1)
keyLearnings: Making --check-quality the single comprehensive flag reduces agent cognitive load: one flag does everything
The constitution gate and decision pipeline were parallel tracks that should have been integrated from the start
residualRisk: Full-stream MCP interface not yet integrated with gate/decision infrastructure. session-state.json gets overwritten on every new session start (bare template pattern).
immediateNextSteps: Integrate full-stream MCP interface (serve-mcp.py) with gate/decision pipeline
Fix session-state.json persistence issue (keep getting overwritten to bare template)
Investigate tools.toml tool count drift (3 pre-existing test failures)
resumeRules: Gate plugins: phase-gate.sh <phase> --check-quality auto-discovers from scripts/gates/<phase>/*.sh
Autonomy cascade: autonomy-gate.sh start | adjust | status
Decision pipeline: decision-pipeline.sh <from->to> chains gates at phase transitions
--check-quality now comprehensive: runs constitution + gates + pipeline in one flag
